samples.text: All fruits are foods. An apple is a fruit. Therefore, is an apple a food?
Every fruit belongs to the category of foods. An apple is classified as a fruit. Does this mean an apple is a food?
All edible fruits are foods. A red apple is an edible fruit. Therefore, is a red apple a food?
An apple belongs to the group of fruits. The group of fruits falls under foods. Based on this, is an apple a food?
All fruits are foods. An apple is a fruit. The meeting started at noon. Therefore, is an apple a food?
